description: "Visual-evidence + regression-test standard for UI/behavioural changes (screenshots as the norm, surfaced in release notes, enforced by the evidence gate)"

# Visual Evidence Standard

Canonical rule for any change that alters what a user sees or how the UI behaves. The operational checklist is the [`visual-evidence`](../skills/visual-evidence/SKILL.md) skill; this file is the rule the [evidence gate](../workflows/evidence-gate.yml) enforces.

## The rule

A PR that touches `_sass/**`, `_includes/**`, `_layouts/**`, `assets/css/**`, or `assets/js/**` MUST also include **both**:

1. **A regression test** — a `test/visual/*.spec.js` spec (smoke tier) that fails
if the change regresses. Prefer behavioural/geometry/computed-style assertions over pixel snapshots so the test survives content edits.
2. **Before/after visual evidence** — generated by
[`test/visual/evidence-kit.mjs`](../../test/visual/evidence-kit.mjs) and committed under `test/visual/evidence/<slug>/` (numbered montages + `metrics.json` + a short `README.md`).

…and the user-visible `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` entry MUST link the evidence folder (paste `CHANGELOG-snippet.txt`) so it flows into release-please release notes.

## Enforcement & opt-out

`evidence-gate.yml` runs on PRs matching the paths above and **fails** when the test or evidence is missing. Genuinely non-visual edits under these paths (a code comment, an identical-output refactor, an `aria-label` correction) opt out with the **`skip-evidence`** label (state why in the PR). The gate is a required check, so it also gates auto-merge.

## Why

- A fixed-position navbar/header makes whole-page regressions look like local
  bugs; element-level overflow evidence catches the real cause (PR #215).
- Screenshots in the PR + release notes give reviewers and users proof, not prose.
- The test is what lets a low-risk **fix** auto-merge without a human (see the
autonomy policy in [`continuous-evolution.md`](../../docs/systems/continuous-evolution.md)).

## Reuse, don't reinvent

- Measurement/montage logic lives in `evidence-kit.mjs` — import
  `generateEvidence`; do not re-implement.
- Layout/overflow assertions live in `test/visual/fixtures.js`
  (`measureNavbarLayout`, `NAV_WIDTHS`, `boxesOverlap`, `assertStackedVertically`).
- `test/visual/navbar-evidence.mjs` + `test/visual/features/navbar.spec.js` are
  the reference implementations.
